results.rendered_html:
yavanikā, yavanī
1 A Yavana female, a Greek or Mahomedan woman; yavanī navanītakomalāṃgī  Jag. ; yatanīmukhapadmānāṃ sehe madhumadaṃ na saḥ  R. 4. 61 ; (from dramas it appears that Yavana girls were formerly employed as attendants on kings, particularly to be in charge of their bows and quivers; cf. eṣa bāṇāsanahastābhiryavanībhiḥ parivṛta ita evāgacchati priyavayasyaḥ  Ś. 2 ; praviśya śārṅgahastā yavanī  Ś. 6 ; praviśya cāpahastā yavanī  V. 5.  &c.).
2 A curtain.
